features: A FRAGRANT EXPERIENCE: Enjoy a fragrant, nourishing experience each time you step into the shower with Palmolive Naturals Coconut & Milk Shower Gel & Body Wash

WITH VITAMIN E: Our shower cream, with a yummy coconut scent mixed with the fresh fruitiness of green mango, is enriched with vitamin E to leave your skin feeling soft and nourished after every shower.

NATURAL ORIGIN INGREDIENTS: Not only does our vitamin E body wash contain plant-based milk, but it’s also made with ingredients of 95% natural origin*. (*Water and naturally sourced ingredients with limited processing.)
98% BIODEGRADABLE FORMULA: Being thoughtful, our shower cream has a new and improved** 98% biodegradable formula and comes in a bottle that you can recycle. (**Increased biodegradability to 98%.)
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Our vitamin E body wash has also been dermatologically tested.
description: Product Description The Palmolive Naturals Coconut & Milk Shower Cream, enriched with Vitamin E, leaves your skin feeling soft & nourished. The beautifully fragrant body wash is inspired by nature to delight your senses. Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Bus Park Middleton Rd Guildford Gu2 5Lz

specifications_table.Active Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Coco-Glucoside, Glycol Distearate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glyceryl Oleate, Glyceryl Stearate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Seed Extract, Tocopherol, Cocos Nucifera Fruit Extract, Linalool.
